original_title: Event listener leak: 100 scroll handlers registered
original_description: Each component mount adds a new scroll listener without removing the previous one. After multiple navigations, 100+ duplicate listeners accumulate, causing noticeable scroll jank and memory growth.

console.message: [Performance] Added 100 scroll event listeners without cleanup
